name: regent_current_fx36lal7zx_floor2_purity_a10_midline
description: 8-turn paired Charge-add and Purity play/target diagnostics for the current Regent A10 floor-2 deck.
assumptions: Layer 2 models the live reward floor.
The options mirror the realtime overlay search policy; the formal run count is 2000 instead of the overlay maximum of 60.
Charge dEV is the plus-Charge variant EV minus the current-deck baseline EV.
Transform diagnostics are collected with the CLI --trace-transforms flag.
